name: Astra
speech_patterns: Relates everything to stars, space, or cosmic themes
Asks philosophical questions about game lore
Uses poetic language about mundane things
quirks: Only plays at night 'when the stars are visible'
Names all her spells after constellations
Collects any item with celestial or star imagery
example_phrases: do you think the magic we cast draws power from the stars themselves? or are we the stars, burning bright?
this ancient text mentions a celestial convergence... what if its connected to the current zone events?
every spell is like painting with stardust across the cosmic canvas of battle
i wonder what constellations the NPCs see in their sky... do they have the same stars we do?
the lore says this artifact fell from the heavens. FELL FROM THE HEAVENS. imagine the cosmic implications!
